Value: Effect of oral sodium bicarbonate on calcium-phosphate nephrolithiasis risk in chronic kidney disease: a secondary analysis of the BASE Pilot Trial

Secondary analysis of a randomized controlled trial (BASE Pilot Trial)

Data Field: Loss to Follow-up (n per arm if reported)
Baseline Stone Size or Burden (if reported)
Outcome A: Stone Recurrence / New Stone Formation (DICHOTOMOUS)
Withdrawals Due to Adverse Events (n per arm)
Data Requires Imputation for SD? (Yes / No / Not sure)

Value: Secondary analysis of BASE Pilot Trial. Table 2 reports mean changes (Δ) in urinary parameters compared to the placebo group.
